content.fact_text: CatalogService implementation for high-performance product retrieval using cache-aside pattern.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements cache-aside logic for product retrieval, utilizing Redis for caching and PostgreSQL (via ProductRepository) as the source of truth. Integrates Opossum circuit breakers for fault tolerance and Zod for runtime data validation. Implements ADMIN-scoped cache invalidation.
interfaces: getProductBySku(sku: string, transactionId: string): Promise<Product | null>
provenance_data.utility: Provides an efficient, fault-tolerant catalog retrieval service that reduces database load via caching, satisfying the high-concurrency requirement.
